pageTitle: See All Ways to Support Us | Dove Cottage
heroImageAlt: Supporters and carers in a welcoming hospice setting
heroH1: See All Ways to Support Us
heroShortDescription: Whether you give your money, your time, or your voice, every contribution helps us provide free and compassionate care for local families.

cards.title: Make a Donation
cards.excerpt: Every gift helps us keep our doors open: one-off, regular, and in-memory giving in a few simple steps.
cards.imageAlt: People supported in our day hospice and community

cards.title: Volunteer Your Time
cards.excerpt: From day hospice to driving, shops, and events - we always need more friendly faces in the team.
cards.imageAlt: Volunteers working together in support of the hospice
cards.stat: Give Your Time to Make a Difference

cards.title: Leave a Gift in Your Will
cards.excerpt: A lasting way to back local care; we can help you find clear, practical information when you are ready.
cards.imageAlt: A thoughtful, hopeful moment in nature
cards.stat: A Future Gift With Lasting Impact

cards.title: Fundraise for Us
cards.excerpt: Cakes, runs, and community fun - we are here to cheer you on and help your fundraiser succeed.
cards.imageAlt: Community fundraising event in high spirits
cards.stat: Any challenge, big or small, counts

cards.title: Visit Our Shops
cards.excerpt: Bottesford and more: pre-loved treasures, bargains, and every pound supporting patient care at home.
cards.stat: Shop Pre-Loved and Support Local Care

cards.title: Corporate Partnerships & Fundraising
cards.excerpt: Work with us on volunteering, awareness, and fundraising that does good for your team and the Vale.
cards.imageAlt: A partnership meeting in a local workplace
cards.stat: New ways to support all year round
